title: Alto Neuroscience Reports Second Quarter 2025 Financial Results and Recent Business Highlights
text: MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif., August 13, 2025 --( BUSINESS WIRE )--Alto Neuroscience, Inc. ("Alto") (NYSE: ANRO) reported financial results for the quarter ended June 30, 2025. Dr. Etkin continued, "The recent data from our exploratory study of ALTO-203 highlights our ability to better guide indication selection and trial design through our use of biomarkers..."

title: BrightSpring Health Services Announces Definitive Agreement to Acquire Haven, Expanding Its Hospice Services into the CON State of Florida
text: LOUISVILLE, Ky., June 24, 2024 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- BrightSpring Health Services (“BrightSpring”) (NASDAQ: BTSG) announced a definitive agreement to acquire the assets of Haven Hospice, a Florida-based company holding a Certificate of Need (CON) for comprehensive hospice care in 18 counties. Total consideration is $60 million.

title: BrightSpring Health Services (BTSG): One-Off $127M Loss Raises Questions on Sustainability of Projected Earnings Growth
text: BrightSpring Health Services (BTSG) is forecast to deliver standout earnings growth of 34.5% per year over the next three years. The company recently turned profitable, but this milestone comes just after absorbing a one-off $127 million loss last year that distorts year-on-year comparisons.

title: BrightSpring Health Services (BTSG): Reassessing Valuation After a Wave of Bullish Analyst Upgrades
text: Several Wall Street firms have recently upgraded BrightSpring Health Services (BTSG), with a 90 day share price return of 34.16 percent and a year to date return of 111.43 percent. NasdaqGS:BTSG PE Ratio as at Dec 2025 reflects growing momentum.

title: What BrightSpring Health Services (BTSG)'s Strong Q3 Rebound Means For Its Future
text: BrightSpring Health Services recently reported third quarter results, showing revenue of US$3.33 billion. Following this, the community narrative shifted toward the sustainability of its margin gains and the impact of its specialized pharmacy growth.

title: Steven Cohen's Point72 Asset Management Buys New Stake in Alto Neuroscience Inc
text: On February 6, 2024, Point72 Asset Management, led by Steven Cohen, acquired a new stake in Alto Neuroscience (ANRO). Alto is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on precision psychiatry. The firm bought 1,486,031 shares.

title: Alto Neuroscience thinks its 'precision' approach will change how we treat depression. Its CEO explains how it's different from the field's past failures.
text: SAN FRANCISCO — At the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 11, 2023, Alto Neuroscience CEO Amit Etkin discussed how the company uses AI and brain-tracking tools like EEG to match patients with the right antidepressants, moving beyond the traditional trial-and-error approach.

title: BrightSpring Health Services to Release Second Quarter 2025 Financial Results on August 1
text: LOUISVILLE, Ky., July 18, 2025 -- BrightSpring Health Services (NASDAQ: BTSG) announced today that it will release its second quarter 2025 financial results before the market opens on Friday, August 1, 2025.

title: BrightSpring Health Services announces terms for its $880 million IPO
text: BrightSpring Health Services announced terms for its IPO on Wednesday, January 17, 2024. The Louisville, KY-based company plans to raise $880 million by offering 53.3 million shares at a price range of $15 to $18.

title: BrightSpring Health Services (BTSG) Surges 36% in One Month
text: BrightSpring Health Services experienced a remarkable 36% price rise over the past month. During this period, broader market trends showed a rise in major U.S. stock indexes, bolstered by favorable inflation data that raised hopes for potential interest rate cuts by the Federal Reserve.

metadata.description: BrightSpring Health Services (BTSG) experienced a remarkable 36% price rise over the past month as at Sep 2025.

title: BrightSpring Health Services, Inc. Announces Promotion of Jennifer Phipps to Chief Financial Officer
text: LOUISVILLE, Ky., March 05, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- BrightSpring Health Services, Inc. (“BrightSpring”) today announced the promotion of Jennifer Phipps to Chief Financial Officer, succeeding Jim Mattingly.

title: BrightSpring Health Services, Inc. Reports Third Quarter 2025 Financial Results
text: LOUISVILLE, Ky., Oct. 20, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- BrightSpring Health Services, Inc. reported preliminary financial results for the third quarter ended September 30, 2025, showing increased Revenue and Adjusted EBITDA.

title: BrightSpring Names First Chief Learning Officer, Hires Chief Information Officer
text: Louisville-based BrightSpring Health Services has named its first-ever chief learning officer and hired a new chief information officer as the company continues to expand its clinical footprint.

title: BrightSpring Health Services Adds Tennessee Home Health Company
text: BrightSpring Health Services has acquired Home Health Care of East Tennessee, Inc. and its related entities, expanding its reach into the Tennessee market.

title: DOJ Review Leads to BrightSpring Divestiture, Delays Haven Hospice Deal
text: The U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) has rejected the sale of certain assets to BrightSpring Health Services Inc., leading to divestiture requirements for the Haven Hospice acquisition.

title: Pomerantz Law Firm Announces the Filing of a Class Action Against Alto Neuroscience, Inc.and Certain Officers – ANRO
text: NEW YORK, Aug. 17, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Pomerantz LLP announces that a class action lawsuit has been filed against Alto Neuroscience, Inc. on behalf of investors who purchased securities between Feb 2, 2024 and Oct 22, 2024.

title: BrightSpring Sued Over Worker Health Plan’s Smoking Surcharges
text: BrightSpring Health Services was hit with a class action lawsuit alleging its employee health plan illegally charged smoking surcharges without providing a proper wellness program to avoid the fee.

title: Since KKR Bought BrightSpring, Some People With Disabilities Have Suffered
text: A yearlong BuzzFeed News investigation found that since private equity giant KKR acquired BrightSpring, neglect and abuse have increased in some of its homes for people with disabilities.

title: Alto Neuroscience said its targeted treatment for depression shows promising signals in midstage trial
text: Alto Neuroscience's ALTO-100 drug showed statistically significant results in a Phase 2 study of patients with depression, using brain markers to identify those most likely to respond.

title: Precision Psychiatry Drug Candidate Shows Promise in Mid-Stage Depression Trial
text: Alto Neuroscience reported that its lead candidate ALTO-100 met its primary endpoint in a Phase 2 trial for Major Depressive Disorder, using biomarkers for patient selection.

title: BrightSpring and PharMerica Announce Formation of Leading Diversified Health Care Services Platform
text: LOUISVILLE, Ky., March 02, 2020 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- BrightSpring Health Services and PharMerica Corporation today announced the completion of their merger, creating a leading provider of home and community-based health services.

title: Alto Neuroscience (ANRO) Maintained with Outperform at Baird
text: Fintel reports that on October 20, 2025, Baird maintained coverage of Alto Neuroscience (ANRO) with an Outperform recommendation and a price target of $32.00.

title: BrightSpring Health Services Announces Secondary Offering of 14 Million Shares by Selling Stockholders
text: LOUISVILLE, Ky., June 10, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- BrightSpring Health Services, Inc. announced that certain stockholders, including affiliates of KKR, intend to offer 14,000,000 shares of common stock in a secondary offering.
